etymology.description: ÁéČ(ÁéČ) (y√Ļ, 'jade') + Śģó(Śģó) (zŇćng, 'ancestor') = jade with ancestral significance
etymology.interpretation: The character Áźģ(c√≥ng) combines the jade radical ÁéČ(ÁéČ) (y√Ļ, 'jade'), indicating the material the object is crafted from, with the phonetic component Śģó(Śģó) (zŇćng, 'ancestor'), referring to its traditional ceremonial use in ancient Chinese culture.
